programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Montana Marshal Seth Bullock relocates to a gold-mining camp, where he crosses paths with Wild Bill Hickok and clashes with the boss of the Gem Saloon.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Swearengen takes a special interest in the survivor of the massacre; Bullock and Star try to buy property; Brom Garret rethinks his recent investment, while his wife treats her anxieties.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Competition arrives for Swearengen; Hickok puts up precious collateral in a poker game; Bullock and Star strike a deal on land for their store; Brom threatens Swearengen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Swearengen directs Farnum to buy back the Garret claim; Alma asks Calamity Jane and Hickok for help; Charlie Utter leaves the camp; Hickok's luck at poker yields an unexpected return.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Deadwood must make its own laws to try a murderer; Swearengen enlists Trixie to help Alma with the Metz child; Doc Cochran fears an illness might threaten the camp.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Bullock encounters resistance in his quest to bring a murderer to justice; the camp fathers dispatch riders to get a precious vaccine; Cochran enlists Jane as a nurse.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: After tracking down a murderer, Bullock returns to camp as a changed man; Swearengen sees through Trixie's latest subterfuge; Alma remains cold on Farnum's bid on her claim.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Riders arrive with a vaccine and word of a possible treaty with the Dakota; Alma rethinks her plans; Tolliver teaches Stubbs a deadly lesson at the expense of a couple of con artists.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Swearengen calls a meeting to set up an informal government; Bullock and Alma compare notes on Ellsworth; Farnum gets a letter from Hickok; Utter offers Jane a job.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Silas Adams arrives with bad news for Swearengen; Bullock regrets having raised his hand at the government meeting; the Rev. Smith gravitates to the Gem Saloon.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: Jewel's Boot Is Made for Walking
programme.desc: Alma's father arrives from New York; Swearengen strikes a bargain with Adams; Jewel travels for help with her leg.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The U.S. Army rolls into Deadwood; Bullock reacts to Russell's intentions regarding Alma; Adams displays his loyalties.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: A Lie Agreed Upon, Part I
programme.desc: Swearengen and Bullock have a violent confrontation; Bullock and Utter discover that mistaken identity led to a fatal shooting at Nuttall's.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: A Lie Agreed Upon, Part II
programme.desc: Alma and Bullock face an abrupt decision about their future; Swearengen prepares for another showdown with Bullock; Calamity Jane returns to camp.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: A scout for a powerful mining operation arrives; ailing Swearengen refuses visitors and medical attention; Farnum finds someone to buy the Hickok letter.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Doc Cochran contemplates a procedure that could cure Swearengen; Bullock attempts to settle into domesticity; rumors about the camp's future begin to spread.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Alma feels unwell; Tolliver makes a discovery about Wolcott; Bullock protects Commissioner Jarry; Samuel Fields finds a kindred spirit in Jane.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Alma proposes forming a bank; Bullock humiliates a claim owner; a teacher tours the camp; Wolcott tests his alliance with Tolliver.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Tolliver enlists Lee to clean up Wolcott's mess; Stubbs confides in Utter; Alma and Bullock confer about her bank.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Nuttall unveils his new bicycle; Swearengen and Bullock discuss alternatives to annexing the Hills to South Dakota; Stubbs gets some unexpected visitors.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Wolcott interrupts the interrogation of Mose; Swearengen amends his deal with Miss Isringhausen; Martha uses the bank's opening to communicate with Alma.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Cochran delivers a dire prognosis; Andy Cramed offers himself as the camp's new minister; Trixie pressures Alma to accept Ellsworth's proposal.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Jarry fears Bullock and Hearst have thrown their support behind Montana; Swearengen uses a camp tragedy to delay an altercation between Wu and Lee.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: George Hearst arrives in camp; Swearengen's manipulations extract a counteroffer from Yankton; Tolliver seeks to improve his position with Hearst; tensions in Chinaman's Alley boil over.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: Tell Your God to Ready for Blood
programme.desc: Deadwood's first true elections approach; one of Hearst's workers is killed at the Gem; Alms has complications with her pregnancy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: I Am Not the Fine Man You Take Me For
programme.desc: A cryptic note tips off Swearengen; Hearst makes his intentions known; Alma's health raises the issue of Sofia's stewardship.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: A stage promoter and old friend of Swearengen arrives in town; Alma offers Hearst a claim deal; Bullock discovers the truth about the Gem killings.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Alma opens Deadwood's first bank; Hearst meets with Swearengen and Tolliver; Bullock brokers a deal.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Dority picks up Capt. Turner's gauntlet; Hostetler completes a deal; Bullock speaks with Hearst.

programme.desc: Bullock and Swearengen contemplate a pre-emptive strike against Hearst; Aunt Lou reunites with her son.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Camp elders meet to discuss the situation with Hearst; Bullock offers a solution to the standoff.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Wyatt Earp and his brother arrive in Deadwood; the town awaits Hearst's next move.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Hearst's men overrun Deadwood; Wu delivers a cryptic message to Swearengen; Langrishe mines Deadwood's talent.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Hearst's henchmen target Alma; those at the Gem treat Barrett rudely; Langrishe recruits a new actress.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Bullock delivers campaign pitches in Sturgis; Trixie decides to take matters into her own hands; Langrishe has a falling-out with Hearst.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Deadwood turns out to vote; Langrishe delays the theater opening; Alma works out a deal for her claim; Utter Freight receives a delivery for Hearst.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadwood: The Movie
programme.desc: Saloon owner Al Swearengen clashes with Sheriff Seth Bullock as the residents of Deadwood celebrate South Dakota's statehood in 1889.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.sub-title: This is Art, This is Spirituality
programme.desc: The rivalry between Dean and Alex Honnold intensifies as both climbers vie to be the first to free solo a route on the 3000-foot El Capitan; as Dean's mental state deteriorates, he alienates his inner circle and accepts a dangerous career opportunity in China.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wilson
programme.desc: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Spectacular Now
programme.desc: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of childhood friends wrestle with the virtue of faith, the possibility of redemption and the problem of evil.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Little Miss Sunshine
programme.desc: The Hoover family -- a man (Greg Kinnear), his wife (Toni Collette), an uncle (Steve Carell), a brother (Paul Dano) and a grandfather (Alan Arkin) -- puts the fun back in dysfunctional by piling into a VW bus and heading to California to support a daughter (Abigail Breslin) in her bid to win the Little Miss Sunshine Contest. The sanity of everyone involved is stretched to the limit as the group's quirks cause epic problems as they travel along their interstate route.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: On Wallach IX, young Valya Harkonnen promises Mother Superior Raquella that she'll protect the Sisterhood by putting one of their own on the Imperial Throne; thirty years later, Valya faces a threat to her long-awaited plan.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: Two Harkonnen sisters combat forces that threaten the future of humankind and establish the fabled sect that will be known as the Bene Gesserit.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: Following a tragedy, young Tula worries about being accepted despite her family name; a skeptical Valya struggles with the decision to take the Sisterhood vow; years later, Valya receives a message that confirms her suspicions.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: Tula tries to understand the origins of the nightmare that affects all acolytes of the sisterhood; as Tula attempts to understand the acolytes' shared dream, Valya sets her plan in motion to redeem House Harkonnen ahead of the Landsraad.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dune: Prophecy
programme.desc: As Corrino names a new Bashar, a Sister with deep connections to the Emperor arrives on Salusa Secundus; after receiving a tip, Desmond goes on a warpath to root out the insurgents; Tula tries to keep her secret project from being discovered.
